message:
Add v prefix to OCSF version table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,17 +51,17 @@ our [release page](https://github.com/tenzir/docs/releases/tag/latest).
 We publish all OCSF schema versions with full cross-references between classes,
 objects, profiles, and types.
